{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410134575349BF29AD7A33B454A"}"},"total":48},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614546729097069337","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢这个剧情！伏笔埋的也不错，符禺傲曼又慈悲所有人都应该信奉他，拜见禺门。嗯。目前没有雷点，挺喜欢剧情和人设，反正就是很喜欢吧，应该是美强惨加疯？期待剧情，就是太少了！","text_exts":[{"e":71,"s":68,"text":"美强惨","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774318425A33B454A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227614546729097069337%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227602847583861492760%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772904410,"group_id":"7602847583861492760","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"许你春风一笑百媚生，愿你一颦一笑似星","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9uiVFLJp/1AsEGlztYABy/Q+SsDcbdlqaVLIBYcpGPJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7efbf51529544b7ba226816deb143177~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879912&x-signature=NevhnB1mPeIvL%2FQtSNuthrg85sM%3D","user_id":"2316049706663412","user_name":"浮生万钱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2316049706663412","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":5,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602847583861492760","book_info":{"abstract":"【女频无限流+无cp+马甲+三男主+万人迷】(新书)

尹自安因意外猝死，被系统绑定。

好消息:有命活了。

坏消息:代价是要修改烂尾小说《穿进漫画，我靠抽卡拯救悲惨男主》。

褚聿，正直善良，强输出的漫画主角，卫东，亦正亦邪，乐子人的小说主角，且两人都有挂。

“系统，我也是有挂的吧？”

“宿主请放心，我们只要攒够剧情修复值，就能兑换技能，各种技能应有尽有哦～”

“怎么获取修复值？”

“等宿主修复剧情后，它会以小说形式投放，由外界读者为您打分，分数越高，修复值越高。”

“嗯…那我首先需要一个吸精的人设和造型。”

于是，轮回上百次的末裔守碑人诞生了，他金发红眸，只为封印罪恶而来。

他即是穿梭于不同副本中的神秘npc，也是为回到陨落旧国的偏执疯子。

奈何人设演绎太完美，被主角团认为是最终boss。

尹自安:“我真的只是一个普通小说家而已。”

主角们:“呵呵。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/63a37490aa95036bed14b87ad91b19ee~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"是酱紫鸭","author_id":"","book_id":"7602847583861492760","book_name":"穿进烂尾小说，被误认为美强疯","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":266,"name":"马甲","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=266&name=马甲&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603319643545027096","read_count":"23110","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"208826"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"82","tags":"悬疑脑洞,异世穿越,无CP,惊悚游戏,马甲","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/63a37490aa95036bed14b87ad91b19ee~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779502425&x-signature=v3S0lGW20GTx3WswVnKsSGKjKcU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4432850751865219","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"156"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032410134575349BF29AD7A33B454A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15380,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30632,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1944},"user_actio
